findings.title: Score percentage exceeds 100% (newWordsTestScore ×100 bug confirmed)
findings.where: 25WT 2차 TOP ONLINE / Students tab — score cells
findings.repro: Navigate to /classes/GNktwcqI18vyAps3iJDf, Students tab, inspect "New:" score in Current Session column
findings.expected: New word test scores should be 0–100%; e.g. "New: ✓ 97%"

findings.title: Pending-challenge badge/count absent from class header and roster (Issue #12)
findings.where: 25WT 2차 TOP ONLINE / class header + roster header
findings.repro: Navigate to /classes/GNktwcqI18vyAps3iJDf, Students tab — look for any challenge count, badge, or indicator
findings.expected: A pending-challenge count or badge should appear (e.g., "2 pending challenges") on the class header or roster
findings.actual: No challenge-related DOM elements at all on Students tab
